title: Gmore Mons [Cobblemon]
description: Adding a few of the missing Gmax models for Cobblemon
body:
This datapack adds a few of the Gmax Pokémon models currently missing in Cobblemon.
It is meant to be used with [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown).

## **Currently added Gmax Pokémons:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**- Kingler**

**- Lapras**

**- Garbodor**

**- Inteleon**

**- Orbeetle (based on El-Pigeon's Orbeetle model from Pigeon's Poke Pack)**

**- Drednaw**

**- Coalossal (based on Blazium Hydro's Orbeetle model from Hydro Reanimodel Pack)**

**- Flapple (based on RedRibbonz's Applin line models from MissingMons Pack)**

**- Appletun (based on RedRibbonz's Applin line models from MissingMons Pack)**

**- Centiskorch**
</details>
